artPrompt: Wide night page, no text. Wisplet (small lantern-spirit Riftling) casts Lantern Soft glow through fog around Elara and egg; companions silhouetted. Amber + soft cyan accents. Original Riftwilds IP only. NO dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, or UI in the image.

lines.text: Wisplet does not blind the dark. It teaches the dark where feet may land.

lines.speaker: Elara Venn
lines.text: Stay with us, little light. The Compact starts with honesty — even to fog.
